definition_of_complete: failure and Gestalt tests are represented

gestalt_kernel.core_outcome: A local civic repair tracker turns vague neighborhood issues into scoped repair tickets.
gestalt_kernel.definition_of_done: Kernel, contract, premortem, and handoff exist with tests and gates.
gestalt_kernel.definition_of_wrong: A form is generated without preserving uncertainty, authority, and follow-up state.
gestalt_kernel.finished_state_experience: A resident describes an issue, Hermes preserves the intent, and the app shows what is known, missing, next, and owner-gated.
non_negotiable_qualities: missing location or authority routes to review
every ticket traces back to the original resident need
gestalt_kernel.smallest_living_version: Local-only static tracker with sample repair tickets and review gates.

acceptance_tests: functional: valid issue becomes a scoped local ticket
failure: missing location routes to review
gestalt: owner can see what is known, unknown, and next
rules: ask when the responsible authority is unclear
gestaltian_contract.workflow: idea -> issue contract -> repair ticket plan -> local UI proof

premortem_report.likely_failure: Hermes builds a generic issue form and loses the review/authority gates.
premortem_report.mitigation: handoff requires traceability, missing-data handling, and no external sends

claim_limits: This proves the prompt/spec package can drive the expected idea-to-handoff shape.
This does not claim a hosted Hermes service, production deploy, public send, spend, DNS, ads, email, analytics, payment, or provider mutation.
Real Hermes execution evidence is a stronger future check, not required for this local prompt-pack proof.
completion_claim: simulated Hermes method proof only; no production or live provider claim
input_idea: Create a local app that tracks neighborhood repair requests.

method_trace.acceptance_test: proof contains kernel, contract, premortem, and handoff
method_trace.final_vision_supported: Hermes moves an app idea into an implementation-ready local proof.
